description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a light orange, slightly mottled surface and a vertical ribbed texture. The pumpkin features a carved face with square eyes and a rectangular mouth, giving it a pixelated, geometric appearance reminiscent of digital or voxel art. The carving creates open cutouts that allow visibility into the hollow interior, suggesting it could be used as a lantern or decorative item. The stem is short, cylindrical, and vertically striped in shades of gray and white, adding a stylized touch. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying the natural ribbing and coloration of the pumpkin's skin. There are no additional decorative accessories or embellishments present.
description: A light orange pumpkin with a pixelated carved face, ribbed texture, and a short striped stem. The front features square cutouts for eyes and mouth, while the rest remains uncarved.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pixelated face with square eyes and a rectangular mouth cut into the pumpkin.
description_view_1: Rear angled view revealing the uncarved back and the vertical ribbing, with the stem visible at the top.
description_view_2: Direct back view displaying the smooth, uncarved surface and the full extent of the pumpkin's ribbing.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the transition from the carved face to the uncarved surface, with part of the eye cutout visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Geometric, pixelated face with square eyes and a rectangular mouth cut out of the front; no additional motifs or etchings.
